Name: JustVibe
Tagline: The search engine for doing, with apps built for you
Description: JustVibe is a free search engine, built to help get things done. Search "plan my 5 day trip to tokyo" and instantly receive a fully functional and interactive trip planner, perfectly set up for Tokyo and running directly in your browser. If your perfect app doesn't exist yet, JustVibe builds a custom one for your exact needs in minutes. Every app is yours to keep forever, with zero code. Chat to customize every detail and share your new app with a single link.

Name: Miora
Tagline: Scale your creativity on editable canvas with agent memory
Description: Not another AI image tool. Miora is an Agentic Creative Studio with Memory. Bring one idea, generate multimodal assets on one editable canvas, turn auto-built memory into a reusable Skill, then create more, always true to your taste. One person, a whole creative studio.

Name: Second Brain for AI v2
Tagline: AI memory that connects the dots across every tool
Topics: Productivity, Developer Tools, Artificial Intelligence, GitHub
Description: Second Brain remembers your projects, people, decisions, and preferences across Claude, ChatGPT, Cursor, Codex, and any MCP client. V2 automatically links related memories, follows those connections during recall, and distinguishes settled decisions from drafts and stale context. Open source and self-hosted in your Cloudflare account.

Name: FetchSandbox
Tagline: API integration testing that remembers what breaks
Description: Most API tests stop at 200 OK. FetchSandbox lets developers and AI agents verify what happens next—webhooks, retries, state changes, async workflows, and failure scenarios. It reproduces the real bug, proves the fix, and remembers what breaks—so your agent catches it before production. Connect via MCP to Cursor, Claude Code, Windsurf, VS Code, and Codex. Explore 60+ APIs—Stripe, GitHub, Clerk, Resend, Twilio, Descope, OpenAI—without burning real API quota or waiting on staging.

Name: ServiceBeard
Tagline: Sync your mailbox with your issue tracker
Description: Turn your customer-facing mailbox into an issue board. ServiceBeard syncs your emails directly to your issue tracker, letting you run a full service desk from your existing workspace. You can leverage the automation pipelines you’ve already set up without investing in expensive, per-seat helpdesk software. It's open-source, connects via standard IMAP/SMTP, and currently supports GitHub, GitLab, and Linear.

Name: CONTRABAND VR Cinema
Tagline: A theatrical experience with friends, from home.
Description: Put on your Quest headset and step into a real cinema with a real audience, watching the same film at the same moment together. Nobody pauses and nobody skips ahead. When the credits roll, you vote on what screens next. This is what going to the movies used to feel like. This is Virtual Cinema.

Name: Gymsly
Tagline: Gym management software for the modern world
Description: The #1 gym management software for fitness businesses. Manage members, billing, class scheduling, CRM and analytics. Start your free 14-day trial.

Name: Mochi Analytics
Tagline: Analytics you would actually want to look at
Description: Most analytics tell you who visited. Mochi tells you which visits became money. Connect Stripe and every dollar maps back to the channel that earned it - Organic, Social, Product Hunt, that one Reddit thread on one page, not 10+ dashboards. One line of script, live in 5 minutes. Plus heatmaps, funnels, custom events, Search Console keywords and a separate AI-crawler chart. Free for 14 days, from $6.99/mo, every feature on every plan.

Name: OGCanvas
Tagline: A visual editor for dynamic Open Graph images
Topics: Design Tools, Developer Tools, Design templates
Description: OGCanvas turns one design into every Open Graph image your site needs. Create a polished 1200×630 template in a visual editor, make text, images, and colors dynamic, then use one hosted render URL to generate a unique preview for each page. Start with 30 templates, preview links across social platforms, and export PNG, JPEG, or WebP. Free to design and download - no watermark or credit card required.

Name: a.v.r.i.z
Tagline: Your commute is build time
Description: a.v.r.i.z is a voice-first AI software engineer on your own cloud dev box. Talk to it from your phone and it writes, runs, tests in a real browser, and deploys your code to a live URL — no laptop, no setup. Unlike editor plugins or chatbots, it's a persistent machine you own, with memory, scheduled tasks, and smart model routing that auto-picks the cheapest capable model so you never overpay. Turn "I have an idea" into "it's live" — spoken into existence, from anywhere.

Name: Slashbar
Tagline: 185+ native Mac actions in one shortcut
Topics: Developer Tools, Artificial Intelligence, Menu Bar Apps
Description: Highlight text anywhere, press ⌘⇧Space, and run 185+ native macOS actions for writing, translation, developer tools, clipboard, files, windows, reminders, and AI. Slashbar works with Claude, Codex, Gemini, and Apple on-device models through the accounts you already use, so there are no API keys or extra AI subscriptions.

Name: AI Visibility
Tagline: Check how ChatGPT, Gemini and Claude talk about your brand
Description: Your customers ask ChatGPT, Gemini, Perplexity and Claude before they ever reach Google. AI Visibility checks how those assistants talk about your brand: whether they name you, who they name instead, and which sources they trust. You get a visibility score, a competitor leaderboard, an AEO audit of your site, and a fix list you can act on the same day. Free to run on any brand and website.

Name: HowFew – See Your Remaining Life
Tagline: How many sunrises do you have left?
Description: HowFew turns your remaining time into something you can see and feel — inspired by Memento Mori. ✦ COUNTDOWN — Days, weeks, or years left. A Stoic quote every day. ✦ LIFE SCROLL — 900 squares, one per month. Past glows gold. Future waits in shadow. ✦ LIFE SCALE — How many meals left? Weekends? Times you'll see your parents? ✦ BONDS — Track time alongside the people you love.

Name: Flowing
Tagline: Ground your academic writing in your own papers.
Description: Flowing is a desktop writing tool that keeps your research library in the writing loop. As you write, it highlights key terms, recalls relevant passages from your PDFs, and lets you ask, polish, and continue writing with suggestions grounded in your own papers, helping deliver better accuracy and alignment than generic AI assistants like ChatGPT. Research writing isn't just about generating fluent text. It's about staying faithful to your evidence. That's exactly what Flowing is designed for.

Name: LinkFolio
Tagline: A personal linkspace for your social media and custom links
Description: Your personal corner of the internet.

Name: Have I Enough?
Tagline: Know when you can stop working, not just when you can retire
Description: Know when you can stop working, not just when you can retire. A private, client-side UK retirement cashflow planner. Model your pensions, investments, income, spending and tax, compare different scenarios, and stress-test your plan against thousands of possible market outcomes.

Name: Dcyde
Tagline: Decision memory for you and your team
Description: How do you keep track of what your team decides? A Slack thread? An email? A notebook you'll never open again? They all vanish. Six months later, nobody remembers why. Dcyde.app is a simple, shareable memory for your decisions. Pin the decision and the why behind it, straight from Slack, Figma, or the app, and actually find it later. Solo developer, small team, or a whole company. Technical or not.

Name: PitchHighway
Tagline: Upload any song and learn to sing it, note by note
Description: Upload any song and PitchHighway turns it into a personalized singing journey — warmups in the song's key, range drills, and phrase-by-phrase practice with real-time pitch feedback, like Guitar Hero for your voice. Try the free range test in your browser.

Name: LockIn for Chrome
Tagline: Increase productivity with AI distraction blocking
Description: The brand new LockIn chrome extension makes your agent even better at blocking distractions for you. Give it your to-do's for tomorrow, it adds them to your dashboard as tasks. Then open your laptop and start a task, every site that is not relevant to the task gets blocked, the ones you need stay available.

Name: Aurora
Tagline: Glass-box Quantitative AI for Humans and Agents
Topics: Artificial Intelligence, GitHub, Data & Analytics, Data Science
Description: Aurora is glass-box quantitative AI that runs locally. Drop in a dataset and 24+ research-grade methods do the real math — anomalies, causality, regimes, forecasts — then every finding is cited to the method and source behind it. A live "0 fabricated" chip guarantees no invented numbers. Cloud LLMs guess; Aurora computes. Includes an MCP server + Python SDK so AI agents can call it for verified math. 100% local, no cloud, no API keys. Open source, Apache 2.0.
